body:
angels1ut:

that look she gets in her eyes when she’s needy just makes me want to drag it all out longer.

when she whimpers “i need you” and bucks her hips towards my hand, i cant help but be a little mean. “you need me, baby? yeah? tell me where.”

she whines harder because she knows i know but im just going to keep playing clueless. her cute sounds and pathetic begging is music to my ears.
